title: AI in Social Media

modules.title: Content Curation Algorithms
modules.sub: How platforms decide what content you see
modules.description: Learners examine the mechanics behind recommendation engines and feed-ranking systems that shape what users encounter online. They analyze how engagement signals, user history, and platform objectives interact to surface or suppress content. By the end, learners can critically evaluate how curation algorithms influence information exposure at scale.

modules.title: Social Network Analysis
modules.sub: Mapping influence, connections, and information flow
modules.description: Learners explore how AI tools analyze relationships and patterns within social networks to identify influential nodes, communities, and viral pathways. They apply network analysis concepts to real-world scenarios involving information spread and social influence campaigns. This module builds the analytical vocabulary needed to understand how platform structure amplifies or dampens certain voices and ideas.

modules.title: Targeted Advertising Systems
modules.sub: Profiling, micro-targeting, and persuasion at scale
modules.description: Learners investigate how AI-driven advertising platforms build detailed user profiles and match ads to audiences with precision. They assess the data pipelines, bidding systems, and behavioral inference models that power targeted campaigns. The module asks learners to weigh the commercial logic of micro-targeting against its implications for privacy and democratic discourse.

modules.title: Platform Governance and Moderation
modules.sub: Rules, algorithms, and human judgment in content moderation
modules.description: Learners examine how platforms combine automated classifiers and human reviewers to enforce community standards at massive scale. They evaluate the tradeoffs between speed, accuracy, consistency, and fairness when AI systems make or recommend moderation decisions. The module challenges learners to consider who sets the rules, how appeals work, and what accountability looks like in algorithmic governance.

synopsis: Understand how AI shapes your social media experience through content filtering and targeted advertising. Learn about algorithmic content moderation and social influence.
